summary: Phase 4 Real-User Readiness: All 10 frontend tests PASSED. Onboarding overlay, skip button, helper text, empty states, recommendation system, decision evaluation, follow recommendation, tab navigation, and RTL layout all work correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: GOOD: OnboardingHint.js properly implements 4-step onboarding with progress dots
GOOD: localStorage persistence for onboarding completion status
GOOD: Skip button hidden on final step, button text changes to 'התחל!' (Start!)
GOOD: Helper text with 💡 icon shown for new users below action input
GOOD: Empty state 'אין נתונים עדיין' displayed correctly for new users
GOOD: Default recommendation 'הפסקה קצרה ומודעת' (recovery) for new users
GOOD: recommendationService.js provides centralized recommendation calculation
GOOD: analyticsService.js provides centralized analytics functions

GOOD: All data-testids present for key elements (onboarding-overlay, onboarding-modal, onboarding-next, onboarding-skip, home-navigation-section, home-action-input, home-follow-recommendation-btn, current-state-summary)
GOOD: ESLint passes on all new service and component files
seed_data_creation: None required - tested with fresh localStorage clear
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 4 implementation complete and verified. Onboarding flow: 4 steps (Welcome, How it works, Follow recommendations, Ready to start). Key test approach: clear localStorage.removeItem('philos_onboarding_complete') to trigger onboarding. Helper text appears only when no history data exists. Recommendation uses centralized recommendationService.js. Analytics uses centralized analyticsService.js. All 4 phases of refactoring verified working.

onboarding_tests.test: Onboarding overlay appears for first-time users
Onboarding can be completed by clicking through all 4 steps
Onboarding can be skipped with 'דלג' button
Skip button hidden on final step

empty_state_tests.test: Helper text appears below action input for new users
empty_state_tests.value: 💡 תאר את הפעולה שעשית או שאתה מתכנן לעשות...

empty_state_tests.test: HomeNavigationSection shows empty state for new users
Recommendation shows default 'התאוששות' for new users

decision_flow_tests.test: Decision evaluation flow works (enter action -> see result)
Follow recommendation button fills action input
Recommendation indicator shows after following recommendation
Evaluate button appears when input has text
Recent history section appears after first decision

tab_navigation_tests.test: All tabs (Home, Insights, System, History) render correctly
Tab buttons show correct Hebrew labels

helper_text.text: 💡 תאר את הפעולה שעשית או שאתה מתכנן לעשות. לדוגמה: "יצאתי להליכה קצרה"
